docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE NON-SERVICE AND REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL (VIA SC-150); FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOBENER, JOSEPH
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-10-2016 AT 01:00 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-19-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 297.00 SERVED FEB-29-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OGBU, EMEKA
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,547.68 FILED BY TOBENER, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT OGBU, EMEKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAY-12-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
